resolved.resolution: Updated PR #6 description to acknowledge transitive major bumps from Remotion update
Committed stale test fixes and .gitignore update in 1fec5ca, pushed to fix/stale-tests-and-a11y
Commit 0d94f41 — scoped TS rules to *.ts/*.tsx files, removed unused remaining var in caption-sync.ts
Removed stale .worktrees/eslint-config worktree that was doubling test suite
PR #7 opened for existing work on chore/eslint-config branch
PR #6 opened with all patch-level updates

dependencies.patchUpdatesAvailable: Remotion 4.0.436→4.0.446 (10 releases since PR #6), @types/node 20.19.37→20.19.39, yaml 2.8.2→2.8.3. All within PR #6 semver ranges — pick up after PR #6 lands.

formatEvolution.auxBlocks: New <!-- AUX title="..." --> block type added to Talk Track v5 (dc3715d). Parser, types, and HTML renderers updated. AUX pill UI refined: always visible (c56a94b), gold/amber glow for has-content state (c98fb7c). 18 tests cover parsing, rendering, and edge cases. Clean extension.
formatEvolution.ttsRefactor: Kokoro TTS reworked: daemon dependency replaced with direct mlx_audio calls via tools/kokoro-tts.py (d38b09e). Stdout contamination fix applied (3662cee). Simpler architecture, fewer failure points.

notes: Fortieth heartbeat. Quiet Monday morning watch — no new code. TypeScript compiles clean. No beads issues. Remotion at 4.0.446 (now 10 patch releases past PR #6's 4.0.436). TypeScript 6.0.2 still flagged for Lee (major). Both PRs #6 and #7 still awaiting Lee's merge (20 and 18 days open now). Engine healthy.
